title: GHZ
description: GHZ state preparation and verification benchmark. Constructs a GHZ state on the device using a BFS spanning tree of the device connectivity, then estimates fidelity via direct fidelity estimation (DFE), parity oscillation curve fitting, or a compressed-sensing DFT estimate of the N-th Fourier coefficient.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'GHZ' for this schema.

num_qubits.description: Number of data qubits for the GHZ state.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit.

method.description: Verification method: 'dfe' (2 circuits, fast, lower-bound fidelity), 'parity_oscillation' (many circuits across [0, 2π), curve-fit amplitude), or 'compressed_sensing' (few circuits across [0, 2π/N), DFT-bin amplitude, recovers the actual coherence).

num_phases.description: Number of phase points for the oscillation-style methods. Ignored for DFE. parity_oscillation needs to cover [0, 2π) densely enough to fit cos(Nφ+θ) (default 20); compressed_sensing samples one period [0, 2π/N) and works with far fewer points (~8).

num_flag_qubits.description: Number of flag qubits for error detection via ZZ stabilizer checks. Set to 0 to disable.
